data.title: Write integration and remediation tests for CLI bug report validation
data.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-bug-report-validation.sh with two test groups:

### Integration test (SC 12):
Create a ticket with `ticket create bug` using a non-conforming title (e.g., "bad title") and a description missing Expected Behavior and Actual Behavior headers. Assert:
- Warnings emitted to stderr (capture via 2>&1 redirection)
- Exit code is 0
- Ticket is persisted (ticket show returns the ticket)

### Actionable remediation test (SC 14):
Create a ticket without required headers, capture stderr warning text, assert warning includes:
- (a) The ticket edit command syntax (e.g., "ticket edit")
- (b) The specific missing header names ("Expected Behavior", "Actual Behavior")
- (c) The path to the bug report template (plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/bug-report-template.md)

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-bug-report-validation.sh (create)

## TDD Requirement
TDD exemption: criterion 3 — task creates test files; tests ARE the deliverable. No RED test for a test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists at tests/scripts/test-bug-report-validation.sh
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-bug-report-validation.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 2 test functions (integration + remediation)
  Verify: grep -c 'test_\|^test ' tests/scripts/test-bug-report-validation.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] Integration test asserts warnings on stderr, exit 0, and ticket persistence
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-bug-report-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS\|ok\|pass'
- [ ] Remediation test asserts warning text includes edit command, header names, and template path
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-bug-report-validation.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS\|ok\|pass'
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
